Added .tasks/WAVE-03/COVERAGE_MATRIX.md with GRACE markup, deterministic W03 test-environment assumptions, requirement-to-test/command coverage matrix, explicit W03 coverage blockers routed to Atlas-qb2.2.2-.2.6, and focused artifact/no-scope checks.

Added Docker-backed repository integration coverage for absent DailyLog reads/no-create, lock/version helpers, exercise notes clear and snapshot immutability, insert reindexing, AddWorkoutSet missing/wrong-user parent no-mutation, set value/null persistence with version bumps, set delete/reindex/version, and retained existing uniqueness/user-isolation/duplicate/cascade constraints. Added service coverage for DailyLog no-create reads, summary mapping/range validation with forwarded args, existing notes update/null clear, negative expectedVersion no-mutation, child stale conflicts/no-last-write-wins, add exercise/set insert reindexing, exercise notes/null/snapshot behavior, add-set missing parent not-found, set value/null persistence, set remove/reindex, and reorder success/version. Focused WorkoutService tests passed and review loop approved.

Added GraphQL executable-schema contract coverage for W03 operation signatures, no WAVE-04 placeholders, Date scalar binding, dailyLog auth/no-create, dailyLogs range success/error propagation, updateDailyLogNotes null success, negative expectedVersion validation, conflict mapping, and addWorkoutSet parent not-found mapping. Fixed DailyLogs resolver to propagate known domain errors without leaking unexpected internals. Focused resolver tests, api:codegen:atlas, git diff --check, spec review, and quality review passed.

Recorded W03 cross-wave regression and no-scope proof in .tasks/WAVE-03/REGRESSION_NO_SCOPE_PROOF.md, updated coverage matrix closure, ran focused WAVE-01 PIN/auth/media and WAVE-02 Exercise Library/workout snapshot checks, Docker-backed repository regression, product-only no-scope greps, frontend/admin diff proof, git diff --check, spec review, and quality review.

No product/code or infra blockers for the coverage epic.

Recorded backend storage and security review in .tasks/WAVE-03/STORAGE_SECURITY_REVIEW.md. Reviewed migrations, sqlc queries, repository transactions, user scoping, FK/cascade/restrict behavior, optimistic version locks, error handling, logging/privacy, and hard non-goals. Recorded GraphQL/API/generated artifact review in .tasks/WAVE-03/GRAPHQL_API_REVIEW.md. Reviewed workouts.graphql, atlas-gqlgen.yml bindings, generated exec/models, resolver forwarding, handwritten resolver mapping, Date scalar integration, typed DailyLogResult errors, placeholder absence, and generated drift. Reran api:codegen:atlas, resolver/API contract tests, generated package compile, status drift check, and placeholder grep. Independent read-only review passed with no Critical, Important, or Minor findings. No blockers or follow-up beads created.

Recorded GRACE/project artifact consistency review in .tasks/WAVE-03/GRACE_PROJECT_CONSISTENCY_REVIEW.md. XML parse passed. grace binary missing, fallback bunx @osovv/grace-cli status/lint ran; known unrelated 24-error/8-warning GRACE baseline separated with no W03 DailyLog/workout lint errors. Re-review passed with no Critical or Important findings. Beads state matches reality: .3.5 remains open and blocked by this bead until closure.

Final codegen, focused host W03 tests, Docker-backed migration/repository tests, api:test, and api:build passed. api:lint was made runnable via temporary golangci-lint; full lint remains a separated baseline fail outside W03, while W03 new-delta lint passed with 0 issues. No-scope checks passed: no frontend diff, no cardio/body-weight product tokens, no charts/export/template/progression behavior. No MR created. Final packet/lint cleanup commits were pushed to origin/wave-03-workout-diary through 472f9d7.
